title: armeria maritima subsp. rouyana
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. rouyana is a subspecies of the maritime thrift plant, a flowering perennial plant that is native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to the presence of phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Armeria maritima subsp. rouyana include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Armeria maritima subsp. rouyana can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
